moments.title: Sir Paul McCartney turns 84!
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder, Wings frontman, and solo artist Sir Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! From The Beatles to Wings and his incredible solo career, what's your favourite Macca track?

angles.name: Songwriting Icon
angles.copy: 84 years young! Today we celebrate the enduring genius of Paul McCartney. His songs have soundtracked generations. Which one means the most to you?

moments.title: Summer Solstice: Longest Day Approaches
moments.blurb: The summer solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs this Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready to soak up the sun! This Sunday marks the Summer Solstice, the longest day of the year. How are you planning to make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Stonehenge Vibes
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is almost here! Sunday morning will see thousands gather at Stonehenge to welcome the sunrise on the longest day of the year. Pure magic!

moments.title: Lionel Richie turns 77!
moments.blurb: The legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday this Saturday, June 20th.

angles.name: Hello, It's Lionel's Birthday
angles.copy: Can you feel it... that it's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday this Saturday? Get ready to dance 'All Night Long' to the absolute legend's hits! What's your fave?

angles.name: Commodores to Solo Superstar
angles.copy: From the Commodores to global solo superstar, Lionel Richie has given us so many timeless tracks. He turns 77 this weekend! Which one are you playing to celebrate?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic sound, celebrates her 41st birthday this Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy Pop
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey this Sunday! Her unique sound has captivated millions. What's your ultimate Lana track?

angles.name: Video Games to Global Star
angles.copy: From the viral success of 'Video Games' to a global icon, Lana Del Rey turns 41 this weekend. Which of her albums is your go-to listen?

moments.title: Brandon Flowers turns 45!
moments.blurb: Brandon Flowers, the charismatic frontman of The Killers, celebrates his 45th birthday this Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Mr. Brightside's Birthday
angles.copy: Are we human or are we dancer? We're celebrating Brandon Flowers' 45th birthday this Sunday! The Killers frontman is still bringing the anthems. What's your favourite Killers song?

angles.name: The Killers Icon
angles.copy: Happy 45th Birthday to Brandon Flowers! The voice behind so many iconic Killers tracks. What's your favourite memory of seeing The Killers live?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic '80s pop star Cyndi Lauper, known for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'True Colors', turns 73 this Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Want to Celebrate
angles.copy: This Monday, we're celebrating the fabulous Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday! 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and we just want to play her hits all day long. What's your fave?

angles.name: True Colors Icon
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! A true icon who always lets her 'True Colors' shine. What's your favourite Cyndi Lauper power ballad?

moments.title: Jason Mraz turns 49!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, famous for 'I'm Yours' and 'The Remedy', celebrates his 49th birthday next Tuesday, June 23rd.

angles.name: I'm Yours, It's His Birthday
angles.copy: Next Tuesday, we're singing 'I'm Yours' to Jason Mraz for his 49th birthday! The acoustic pop maestro has given us so many feel-good tunes. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Good Vibes Songwriter
angles.copy: Happy 49th Birthday to Jason Mraz next week! From coffeehouse gigs to global stardom, his music always brings the good vibes. Which Mraz song is your ultimate mood-booster?

moments.title: F1 Austrian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Lenovo Austrian Grand Prix takes place this weekend, June 26th-28th, at the Red Bull Ring.

angles.name: F1 Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for high-octane action! The F1 Austrian Grand Prix kicks off this weekend, June 26th-28th. Who are you backing for the win at the Red Bull Ring?

angles.name: Red Bull Ring Thrills
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! The Austrian Grand Prix is just around the corner. Expect drama and speed on the iconic Red Bull Ring. Who's your favourite F1 driver?

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33!
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday next Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Thank U, Next Birthday
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande! What's your ultimate Ariana bop to get you dancing?

angles.name: Pop Powerhouse
angles.copy: From Broadway to pop powerhouse, Ariana Grande has dominated the charts for over a decade. Celebrate her 33rd birthday next week by blasting your favourite track!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's most prestigious tennis tournament, begins on Monday, June 29th, running until July 12th. Qualifying rounds start June 22nd.

angles.name: Tennis Season Begins
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 officially begins on Monday, June 29th. Who are you hoping to see lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The grass courts are calling! Wimbledon qualifying begins on Monday, June 22nd, with the main tournament kicking off the following week. It's almost time for some world-class tennis!
